title: SystemVerilog interface signals being omitted during synthesis

features.name: interface with signals as module port type
features.description: Code should include a SystemVerilog interface with multiple signals (like AWVALID, AWREADY) used as a typed module port

features.name: interface instantiation at top level
features.description: Code should include interface instances created at the top level of a module (not passed as parameter)

features.name: interface signal access via dot notation
features.description: Code should include accessing interface signals using dot notation like \AXIL.AWVALID within a module
